utility_evaluation.REASONING:

1. destination – provided and fully specified as 'Lisbon, Portugal'. 
2. travel_dates – provided as '2024-06-20 to 2024-06-24'. 
3. transportation – includes flight details (airline, airports, class, total_cost, baggage, cancellation) → fully specified with costs. 
4. accommodation – includes hotel name, type, location, nights, price_per_night, total_cost, breakfast, wifi → fully specified with costs. 
5. activities – includes name, duration_hours, total_cost, guide_included, outdoor → fully specified with costs. 
6. additional_services – includes dining details (restaurant name, cuisine, price_per_person, total_cost, dietary_accommodations) → fully specified with costs. 
7. total_budget – includes total_cost, currency, budget_remaining → fully specified. 
All 7 items are present and complete.
